name: ench0812-plugins
description: Custom engineering workflow plugins by Mark Huang

plugins.name: eng-flow
plugins.description: Streamlined engineering workflow skills — merged from superpowers + agent-skills, optimized for token efficiency (~93% reduction). 11 skills: mao-init, mao-brainstorm, mao-plan, mao-execute, mao-debug, mao-tdd, mao-review, mao-ship, mao-secure, mao-optimize, mao-comply — plus ISO 27001 enforcement hooks and model-routing rules.
